name: aws-kms
description: Envelope provider: stores the unlock key as a KMS-wrapped data-key blob and unwraps it at boot via AWS KMS, authorized by the container's AWS identity (instance/task IAM role, or IAM Roles Anywhere for non-AWS hosts). The KMS key never enters the container.

vars.name: CEV_KMS_BLOB
vars.description: Path to the KMS-encrypted data-key blob (binary CiphertextBlob). Safe to ship alongside the data — useless without the KMS identity.

vars.name: CEV_AWS_REGION
vars.description: AWS region of the KMS key (e.g. eu-central-2 for Zurich). Falls back to the ambient AWS config if unset.
